props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

props.name: position
props.description: Provides control to where the popover content is positioned.

props.name: maxWidth
props.description: Sets the maximum width of the popover container.

props.name: minwidth
props.description: Sets the minimum width of the popover container.

props.name: width
props.description: Sets a fixed width for the popover container.

props.name: height
props.description: Controls the height behavior. 'full' stretches to parent height, 'wrap-content' fits content.

props.name: preventScrollIntoView
props.description: Prevents scrolling into view when focus trap is activated. Passed to FocusTrap.

props.name: padded
props.description: Sets if the popover has padding. Use false when content needs to be flush with boundaries.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Sets the tabindex. Use -1 to skip tabbing when a parent handles keyboard events.

props.name: relative
props.description: @deprecated This property has no effect and will be removed in a future version.

props.name: mt
props.description: Top margin.

props.name: mr
props.description: Right margin.

props.name: mb
props.description: Bottom margin.

props.name: ml
props.description: Left margin.

props.name: open
props.description: Controls whether the popover is open or closed. Used by parent components like AppHeaderMenu.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the popover interaction. Used by parent components like Dropdown.

props.name: voffset
props.description: Additional vertical offset added to the popover's position.

props.name: hoffset
props.description: Additional horizontal offset added to the popover's position.

props.name: focusborderwidth
props.description: Width of the focus outline border.

props.name: borderradius
props.description: Border radius of the popover window.

props.name: filterablecontext
props.description: Indicates the popover is used within a filterable context like a combobox.
